author: samcm
content: Heya <@1309183459582808086>, you're on the money so far! We removed cl-mimicry and use Tysm for most of that data now. Unfortunately Tysm is in a private repo atm because we use it for other testing purposes that can't be public

author: samcm
content:
What tables in the libp2p section are you looking for exactly? We have a fork of lighthouse and teku which can hook in to the beacon_block, attestation, aggregate_and_proof, and data_column_sidecar data.  Unfortunately they don't support any of the lower level libp2p ones (like `ihave` etc.)

If that's all you're looking for, these are the repos:
https://github.com/ethpandaops/dimhouse
https://github.com/ethpandaops/temu

author: kyriakos.c1_91872
content:
I'm not after something specific. I just did a spotcheck on the clickhouse UI to see if the system works and noticed that these tables are empty. 

I just want to be sure I didn't miss any components 🙂
